title: Farmer's Cutting: BetterNether
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for BetterNether
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) cutting board recipes for [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
> Also supports these unofficial [Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether-forge) and [NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether-neoforge) ports of BetterNether for use with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all (applicable) wood types
- Gray Mold can be cut into more dye

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RFzQi5Io/images/829d96e2ef0e348b1bcaacfdf6c2c33679aa1827.png) ![Gray Mold Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RFzQi5Io/images/a7d3970e938baa7f536d4ccb021e762f408cce49.png)
